title: gynostemma pentaphyllum
intro: Gynostemma pentaphyllum, also known as Jiaogulan, is a perennial vine native to Asia and is part of the Cucurbitaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and adaptogenic effects, which help to balance the body's stress response. The health benefits of Gynostemma pentaphyllum include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, as well as potentially aiding in weight loss and improving cognitive function. Gynostemma pentaphyllum is commonly consumed in herbal preparations such as tea, capsules, and extracts, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
